tracks.meaning: a machine or device that converts energy into mechanical motion to power or propel something
the core component of a computer system that executes instructions and controls other hardware components
the main machinery of a ship that provides propulsive power
a person or organization that drives or powers a business process or initiative forward
a driving force or motivation that propels someone toward action or achievement
a person who is intelligent, capable, or driving force in a particular field or activity
the mechanical or operational system that powers military vehicles or weapons
the propulsive mechanism that generates motion or power for locomotion
